mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EVENT ( E_ID, E_TITLE, E_CONTENT, E_STARTDATE,E_ENDDATE, E_CREATEDDATE, E_TYPE ) VALUES ( #{e_id}, #{e_title}, #{e_content}, #{e_startDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{e_endDate, jdbcType=DATE}, SYSDATE, #{e_type} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM EVENT ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(E_INDEX) ASC
SELECT * FROM EVENT WHERE E_POPUP = 'Y' ORDER BY E_INDEX ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE EVENT SET E_TITLE = #{e_title}, E_INDEX = #{e_index}, E_CONTENT = #{e_content}, E_STARTDATE = #{e_startDate}, E_ENDDATE = #{e_endDate}, E_TYPE=#{e_type} WHERE E_ID = #{e_id}
